headline: Top 3 Industrials Stocks You'll Regret Missing In May
summary: Opportunity to buy into undervalued oversold stocks in the industrials sector. RSI compares stock strength on up/down days & helps predict short term performance. List of oversold players.

headline: Is Leidos Holdings (LDOS) Pricing Overreacting To Recent Volatility In Light Of Cash Flow Outlook
summary: To figure out whether Leidos Holdings is attractively priced, you need more than a quick glance at the share price or a single valuation metric. Recently, the stock has been volatile, with a 7.5% 7 day return decline, a 15.4% 30 day return decline, a 26.5% year to date return decline, but still a 74.5% 3 year return and a 41.7% 5 year return. News around the company has kept it on investors' radar, adding context to these sharp short term moves in the share price. This makes it important to...
